processed_videos.title: I BUILT A FULLY AUTOMATIC MANSPLAINER
processed_videos.summary: The creator built a "fully automated mansplainer" device, powered by an NVIDIA DGX Spark, which uses a sequence of AI models (Whisper, Mistral, VIVE Voice) to transcribe speech, generate pedantic corrections, and vocalize them. This compact, powerful edge AI device demonstrates running large language and speech models locally to create an interactive, albeit humorously annoying, AI agent.
